mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, config_json, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM batch.notification_channel WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.notification_channel (tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, config_json, enabled, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{channelCode}, #{channelName}, #{channelType}, #{configJson}::jsonb, #{enabled}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, channel_code) DO UPDATE SET channel_name = excluded.channel_name, channel_type = excluded.channel_type, config_json = excluded.config_json, enabled = excluded.enabled, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, is_deleted = false, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.notification_channel SET channel_name = #{channelName}, channel_type = #{channelType}, config_json = #{configJson}::jsonb, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND channel_code = #{channelCode} AND is_deleted = false
